prompt: Add real-time notifications when someone replies in the community.
method: constitution-bound expand simulation (same packs/contracts/evidence as forge expand-node; ANTHROPIC_API_KEY unavailable in eval VM)

nodes.label: Meaning of being answered
nodes.details: A reply is proof she is not alone in the money conversation — that is the belonging beat.

nodes.label: When silence is sacred
nodes.details: Not every pause needs a ping; the story protects quiet as part of trust.
nodes.strategicAnswer: silence can be sacred. No notification spam.

nodes.label: Reject engagement theater
nodes.details: Growth-style notification spam would hollow the calm courage identity.
nodes.strategicAnswer: Prefer quiet belonging over engagement spam.

nodes.label: Gentle presence signal
nodes.details: Signal should feel like a hand on the shoulder, not a scoreboard of attention.

nodes.label: Reply as formation
nodes.details: Notifications serve communal formation — she was heard — not retention metrics.
